manifest.name: PO Editor

name: PO Editor

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Initial release

### Features

- **Grid editor** — translate PO entries in a structured table with inline editing, status indicators, and keyboard navigation
- **Plural forms** — dedicated editor for plural forms with per-language plural rule support
- **Stats dashboard** — live progress panel showing translated, fuzzy, untranslated, and obsolete entry counts per file
- **Text mode** — toggle between the grid editor and raw PO source text
- **Format conversion** — import/export translations as JSON, YAML, CSV, Android XML, iOS Strings, Flutter ARB, and XLIFF
- **Fuzzy matching** — suggestions from existing translations to speed up new entries
- **Filters** — filter entries by status (untranslated, fuzzy, translated, obsolete)
- **Header editor** — fix or update PO file headers via a dedicated modal

### Installation

**Via BRAT** (recommended until Community Plugins listing):
1. Install the [BRAT plugin](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat)
2. Add `Kodaskills/obsidian-po-editor` as a beta plugin

**Manual:**
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from the assets below and place them in `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-po-editor/`.
